name: investing-research
description: Read-only, evidence-first audits of finance repositories, Skill bundles, and research tooling

interface.shortDescription: Audit finance repositories without credentials or trading.
interface.longDescription: Evidence-first local repository and Skill-bundle audits for licenses, copied content, data providers, backtests, authentication boundaries, prompt injection, and automated-trading risk. Defaults to offline, read-only analysis.
defaultPrompt: Audit a local finance repository without networking or credentials.
Compare finance data projects by evidence, license, and safety.
Turn a repository audit into Raw and Wiki knowledge cards.
Audit a local finance Skill bundle before installing it.
